description: This is a photograph of a sandy dune landscape under a partly cloudy sky. The image prominently features a sandy hill or dune in the foreground and mid-ground, with a texture suggesting fine sand. Sparse, low-lying green vegetation, identified as small trees or shrubs, grows on top of and around the dune. The background shows more sandy terrain and a light blue sky with scattered clouds. The image captures Maspalomas dune in the Canary Islands, Spain. Credit: M. Palacios.
